import * as component_1 from '@kne/remote-loader';
import * as component_2 from 'react-router-dom';
import * as component_3 from 'lodash';
const readmeConfig = {
    name: `remote-loader`,
    summary: `<p>remote-loader 是一个用于 React 应用程序的远程模块加载库，它基于 Webpack 5 的 Module Federation 功能，使开发者能够轻松地在应用程序中动态加载和使用远程模块。</p>
<p>这个库特别适合构建微前端架构，允许不同团队独立开发和部署各自的模块，然后在运行时动态集成。通过 remote-loader，你可以实现真正的模块化开发，每个模块都可以独立构建、版本控制和更新，而无需重新部署整个应用。</p>
<h3>核心特性</h3>
<p>remote-loader 提供了三种灵活的加载方式来满足不同的开发场景：</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>RemoteLoader 组件</strong>：声明式组件方式，简单直观，适合大多数场景</li>
<li><strong>withRemoteLoader 高阶组件</strong>：函数式编程方式，适合需要批量加载多个模块的场景</li>
<li><strong>useLoader 钩子</strong>：Hook 方式，适合在函数组件中进行细粒度控制</li>
</ul>
<h3>灵活的模块标记</h3>
<p>支持丰富的模块标记格式，可以指定远程地址、版本、子模块等：</p>
<ul>
<li>简单格式：<code>module-name</code></li>
<li>带远程：<code>remoteName:module-name</code></li>
<li>带版本：<code>remoteName:module-name@version</code></li>
<li>带子模块：<code>remoteName:module-name@sub-module</code></li>
<li>带属性访问：<code>remoteName:module-name.property</code></li>
<li>完整格式：<code>http://example.com/remoteName/version:module-name@sub-module.property</code></li>
</ul>
<h3>全局配置与缓存</h3>
<p>通过 <code>preset</code> 函数可以设置全局配置，包括远程容器地址、默认版本、加载状态组件和错误处理等。内置的缓存机制确保同一模块只会被加载一次，提升性能。</p>
<h3>完善的错误处理</h3>
<p>提供了多层次的错误处理机制，包括全局错误回退、组件级错误回退和错误回调函数，确保应用在模块加载失败时仍然能够优雅降级。</p>`,
    description: `加载一个webpack5生成的邦联模块`,
    packageName: `@kne/remote-loader`,
    api: `<h3>组件</h3>
<h4>RemoteLoader</h4>
<p>用于加载远程模块的 React 组件。</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>属性</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>必填</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>module</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>是</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>远程模块标记，格式：<code>[模块地址/remote/version:]模块名[@子模块][.模块属性]</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>...props</td>
<td>any</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>传递给加载的远程模块的属性</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>高阶组件</h3>
<h4>withRemoteLoader</h4>
<p>用于包装组件并提供远程模块加载功能的高阶组件。</p>
<p>包装后的组件接收以下属性：</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>属性</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>必填</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>modules</td>
<td>Array&lt;string&gt;</td>
<td>是</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>远程模块标记数组</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>onLoadComplete</td>
<td>Function</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>模块加载完成的回调函数，接收加载的模块数组</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>fallback</td>
<td>ReactNode</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>null</td>
<td>加载中显示的内容</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>remoteError</td>
<td>ReactNode | Function</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>null</td>
<td>加载失败时显示的内容，可以是 React 节点或函数</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>...props</td>
<td>any</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>传递给被包装组件的属性</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>被包装组件通过 <code>remoteModules</code> 属性接收加载的模块数组。</p>
<h4>createWithRemoteLoader</h4>
<p>用于创建带预设配置的 withRemoteLoader 高阶组件。</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>必填</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>params</td>
<td>Object</td>
<td>是</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>预设参数</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>params.modules</td>
<td>Array&lt;string&gt;</td>
<td>是</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>远程模块标记数组</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>返回一个 HOC，该 HOC 的属性会与预设参数合并。</p>
<h3>钩子</h3>
<h4>useLoader</h4>
<p>用于在函数组件中加载远程模块的 React 钩子。</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>必填</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>config.modules</td>
<td>Array&lt;string&gt;</td>
<td>是</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>远程模块标记数组</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>config.onLoadComplete</td>
<td>Function</td>
<td>否</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>模块加载完成的回调函数，接收加载的模块数组</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><strong>返回值：</strong></p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>名称</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>loading</td>
<td>boolean</td>
<td>是否正在加载</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>error</td>
<td>Error</td>
<td>加载错误，如果没有错误则为 null</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>remoteModules</td>
<td>Array</td>
<td>加载的远程模块数组</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>函数</h3>
<h4>loadModule</h4>
<p>加载远程模块的核心函数，内部使用缓存机制。</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>参数</th>
<th>类型</th>
<th>必填</th>
<th>默认值</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>token</td>
<td>string</td>
<td>是</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>远程模块标记</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><strong>返回值：</strong></p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>类型</th>
<th>描述</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Promise&lt;any&gt;</td>
<td>解析为加载的远程模块的 Promise</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h4>safeLoadModule</h4>
<p>安全加载远程模块的函数。</p>
<table>

<tr>
<th>参数</th>

</thead>
<tbody>

<td>token</td>
<td>string</td>

</table>
<p><strong>返回值：</strong></p>
<table>

<tr>

</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>

<td>Promise&lt;any&gt;</td>
<td>解析为加载的远程模块的 Promise</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h4>parseToken</h4>
<p>解析模块标记的函数。</p>
<table>

<tr>

<tr>

</tr>

<td>options.fallback</td>

                    {
                        name: "date",
                        title: "日期",
                        type: "date",
                        hover: true,
                    },
                    {
                        name: "datetime",
                        title: "日期时间",
                        type: "datetime",
                        hideSecond: true,
                    },
                    {
                        name: "serialNumber",
                        title: "编号",
                        type: "serialNumber",
                        primary: true,
                        onClick: async (item) => {
                            console.log(item);
                            return new Promise((resolve) => {
                                setTimeout(() => {
                                    resolve(true);
                                }, 10000);
                            });
                        },
                    },
                    {
                        name: "serialNumberShort",
                        title: "短编号",
                        type: "serialNumberShort",
                    },
                    {
                        name: "title",
                        title: "主要信息",
                        type: "mainInfo",
                    },
                    {
                        name: "tag",
                        title: "状态标签",
                        type: "tag",
                        valueOf: () => ({type: "success", text: "审核通过"}),
                    },
                    {
                        name: "tagEnum",
                        title: "标签枚举",
                        type: "tag",
                        valueOf: (item) =>
                            item.tagEnum && {
                                type: "success",
                                isEnum: true,
                                moduleName: "marital",
                                name: item.tagEnum,
                            },
                    },
                    {
                        name: "avatar",
                        title: "头像",
                        type: "avatar",
                        valueOf: () => ({gender: "F"}),
                    },
                    {
                        name: "user",
                        title: "用户",
                        type: "user",
                        valueOf: (item) => \`\${item.enUserName} \${item.userName}\`,
                    },
                    {
                        name: "hideInfo",
                        title: "隐藏字段",
                        type: "hideInfo",
                        valueOf: (item) =>
                            item["phoneNumber"] && {
                                loader: () => {
                                    return item["phoneNumber"] + "-" + item["id"];
                                },
                            },
                    },
                    {
                        name: "userName",
                        title: "用户名",
                        type: "userName",
                    },
                    {
                        name: "contacts",
                        title: "联系人",
                        type: "contacts",
                        valueOf: (item) => \`\${item.userName} \${item.phoneNumber}\`,
                    },
                    {
                        name: "count",
                        title: "数量",
                        type: "singleRow",
                        render: ({target}) => {
                            return target.count === 5 ? {hover: true} : {hover: false};
                        },
                    },
                    {
                        name: "description",
                        title: "描述",
                        type: "description",
                    },
                    {
                        name: "description2",
                        title: "描述(省略)",
                        type: "description",
                        ellipsis: true,
                    },
                    {
                        name: "other",
                        title: "其他",
                        type: "other",
                        hover: true,
                    },
                    {
                        name: "options",
                        title: "操作",
                        type: "options",
                        valueOf: (item) => [
                            {
                                onClick: () => {
                                    return new Promise((resolve) => {
                                        setTimeout(() => {
                                            resolve();
                                        }, 1000);
                                    });
                                },
                                children: "分配Program及教练",
                            }
                        ],
                    },
                ]}
        />
    </div>;
};

render(<BaseExample/>);
